componentsAfter.name: contactInset
componentsAfter.content: Your enquiry will be sent to the {{ service }} team

componentsAfter.name: otherWays
componentsAfter.content:
Other ways to get in touch

Is your issue urgent? Would you prefer to call us? Find the appropriate phone number on our contact us page.

customText.title: Contact request submitted
customText.nextSteps:
We have sent a confirmation email to {{ email }}.

What happens next

We will review your request and get back to you within 5 days.

items.text: I need radiation measurements, testing, or dosimetry
items.description: Including personal dose monitoring, instrument calibration, dental X-ray equipment testing, laboratory analysis, radon measurement, chromosome dosimetry, or whole body monitoring

items.text: I work with radiation and need compliance or safety advice
items.description: Including Radiation Protection Advisor support, dangerous goods, non-ionising radiation, medical exposures, dental or environmental radiological assessments

items.text: I want to enquire about training courses and facilities, or an existing course booking
items.description: Including workplace radiation safety, specialist professional training, emergency preparedness, laser safety, non-ionising radiation courses, or hiring our training facilities

items.text: I need help with a software product or tool
items.description: Including PACE, PC-CREAM, Taurus, IMBA, or other dosimetry and radiological impact assessment software

items.text: I'm interested in research, collaboration, or specialist consultancy
items.description: Including radiation effects research, medical dosimetry, emergency preparedness, and working with UKHSA

items.text: I'm not sure, or my enquiry doesn't fit the above
items.description: If your enquiry does not fit any of the above, tell us in more detail in the next step
Measurement of radon gas levels in homes, workplaces, and other buildings, with advice on remediation
Approved dosimetry service measuring and recording radiation doses received by customers and their employees
Assessing the damage to DNA, caused by ionising radiation exposures, in individual blood samples, in order to give an estimation of radiation dose
X-ray equipment testing, quality assurance assessments, and radiation protection advice for dental practices and trade companies
Calculation of radiation doses to patients and staff from radiopharmaceuticals, with detailed reports for clinical and regulatory use
Testing, calibration, and approval of radiation protection instruments
Analysis of environmental, biological, and other samples for radioactive content
Assessment of internal contamination by measuring gamma-emitting radionuclides in the body
Your enquiry will be reviewed and directed to the most appropriate team, tell us in more detail in the next
Specialist training in biological dosimetry techniques, including cytogenetic methods used for individual dose assessment and emergency triage.
Training on the health effects of electromagnetic fields, optical radiation, and other non-ionising hazards and how to comply with relevant regulations
Training courses for emergency responders and planners, including NAIR training, exercises, and preparedness for radiological or nuclear incidents
Hire of specialist training facilities at UKHSA sites. Suitable for organisations delivering their own radiation protection or related training courses

items.text: Radiation Safety Training for the Workplace
items.value: Radiation Safety Training for the Workplace
items.description: Face-to-face and online courses covering all aspects of radiation safety
Professional-level courses including the Radiological Protection Training Scheme, designed for graduates and practitioners seeking specialist qualifications
Your enquiry will be reviewed and directed to the most appropriate team, tell us in more detail in the next
Compliance advice for organisations transporting radioactive or other dangerous goods, covering legal requirements and practical safety measures
Radiation Protection Advisor and medical physics expertise, quality assurance and equipment assessments for dental practices and X-ray equipment suppliers
Consultancy on the radiological impact of routine discharges and accidental releases, supporting discharge authorisations and regulatory submissions
Specialist analytical consultancy for organisations needing independent advice on radioactive sample analysis or measurement methodology
Guidance, reports, and expert advice on radiation doses from medical and diagnostic imaging exposures, supporting clinical and regulatory decision-making
Advice and consultancy on electromagnetic fields, optical radiation, lasers and other non-ionising radiation hazards in the workplace
Appointed RPA support under IRR17, covering industry, education, veterinary, dental, and medical workplaces
Your enquiry will be reviewed and directed to the most appropriate team, tell us in more detail in the next
Bespoke modelling tools and software products for assessing the impact of planned and accidental releases of radioactivity to the environment
Level-3 Probabilistic Safety Analysis tool for evaluating off-site radiological consequences of accidental releases from nuclear facilities
Suite of models for assessing the radiological impact of routine, continuous discharges from nuclear and non-nuclear installations

items.text: Taurus and IMBA Internal Dosimetry Software
items.value: Taurus and IMBA Internal Dosimetry Softwar
items.description: Software for calculating internal radiation doses from intakes of radionuclides
Your enquiry will be reviewed and directed to the most appropriate team, tell us in more detail in the next
Research and development in biological dosimetry, including novel assay development and collaboration with international biodosimetry networks
Specialist research, advice, and guidance on radiation doses from medical exposures, supporting clinical practice, regulation and radiation protection policy
Research into the health effects of ionising radiation exposure, including epidemiological studies and mechanistic research underpinning radiation protection standards
Research, consultancy, and collaborative work supporting UK readiness for radiological or nuclear emergencies, including post-accident recovery and environmental assessment

items.text: Working with UK Health Security Agency
items.value: Working with UK Health Security Agency
items.description: Collaborative projects, access to specialist facilities, equipment, and intellectual property and longer-term partnership arrangements with UKHSA
Your enquiry will be reviewed and directed to the most appropriate team, tell us in more detail in the next
